editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 of 227 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
Pooled 0.32 diverges from Saag 2017 benchmark (RR 0.52 [0.40, 0.66]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
I² = 76.5% (considerable); show subgroup/strata estimates alongside pooled.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
